title: Clearer Glass
description: There's 3 Different Versions of Glass Border Only : Borderless : Invisible
body:
# Clearer Glass
This pack updates the appearance of all types of glass in every version.

Each version has its own file – pick your favorite from the download page
## There are three different styles, each available as a separate download

- Border-Only Glass – Keeps only the outer edges visible for a cleaner look.

- Borderless Glass – Removes all borders for a seamless, clear appearance.

- Invisible Glass – Makes glass completely transparent and nearly undetectable.

<details>
<summary>How to Download</summary>

1. launch Minecraft
2. Click "Esc"
3. Click "Options"
4. Click "Resourse Packs"
5. Open "File Explorer"
6. Go to "Downloads"
7. Drag and Drop The File in the "Resourse Packs" Tab
8. Click "Yes"
9. Then Click the Resourse Pack icon
10. Click Done

**Your Done**
</details>

<details>
